description: User scrolls through the list of available opportunities on the page.
User hovers the cursor over the 'AI Interview' opportunity card.
frame_description: The cursor lingers on the red AI Interview card before moving towards the browser tabs.

description: User clicks on the 'Askable Sessions' browser tab to switch views.
User pauses to read the initial prompt on the Askable Sessions page.
frame_description: The screen shows a dark background with the text 'As you look at those nine opportunities, what's catching your eye now?'

description: The prompt text on the screen dynamically updates to a new question.
frame_description: Text 'What makes you lean towards a short task right now?' appears word-by-word on the screen.

description: User hovers over the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' browser tab, triggering a preview window.
